name: currencymachine
title: Currency Converter
author: Generated by Botcraft
short_description: Converts currency from one denomination to another using live exchange rates.
long_description: This machine takes an amount in a source currency and converts it to a target currency using live exchange rates fetched from an external API.

specification.input:
• amount: The amount of money to convert.
  • from_currency: The currency code of the source currency.
  • to_currency: The currency code of the target currency.
specification.output:
• converted_amount: The converted amount in the target currency.
  • exchange_rate: The exchange rate used for conversion.

faq.question: How does the currency converter work?
faq.answer: It uses live exchange rates from an external API to convert the specified amount from one currency to another.
